vocab.meaning: vui chơi tự do (không có quy tắc gò bó)
vocab.example: I spent most of my weekends engaged in unstructured play, which I believe is vital for developing a child's autonomy.

vocab.meaning: các nỗ lực/hoạt động nghệ thuật
vocab.example: My parents always encouraged my artistic endeavors, such as pottery and finger painting, providing me with all the necessary supplies.

vocab.meaning: tình bạn thân thiết, sự đồng lòng
vocab.example: Participating in neighborhood scavenger hunts built a strong sense of camaraderie among the local children.

vocab.meaning: các hoạt động theo đuổi mang tính giải trí
vocab.example: Swimming and cycling were my primary recreational pursuits whenever the summer break rolled around.

vocab.meaning: gợi lại cảm giác hoài niệm
vocab.example: Thinking about those afternoons spent building sandcastles always evokes a profound sense of nostalgia in me.
Solving complex riddles and puzzles was a favorite pastime that significantly aided my cognitive development.

vocab.meaning: những cuộc phiêu lưu kỳ thú/kỳ quặc
vocab.example: My siblings and I were known for our whimsical escapades in the attic, pretending it was a time machine.

vocab.meaning: tương tác với bạn bè đồng lứa
vocab.example: I preferred group activities because they allowed for more peer interaction and shared excitement.

vocab.meaning: tinh thần mạo hiểm/thích khám phá
vocab.example: Fueled by an adventurous spirit, I would often venture into the deeper parts of the garden to look for 'hidden treasures'.

vocab.meaning: kỹ năng vận động tinh (sự khéo léo của đôi tay)
vocab.example: Crafting intricate origami figures was not only fun but also a great way to hone my fine motor skills at a young age.
